channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Boost Dev Brain (April 2026)
item.description: Unlock a Second Brain as a dev: organize code, retain knowledge, and boost productivity with actionable tips.

item.title: 0 to Tech Job in 12 Mos
item.description: Get a tech job in 12 months with a proven roadmap, insider tips and a step-by-step guide to launching your career.

item.title: Stripe's Secure Pay Flow
item.description: Unlock secure payment processing with Stripe, protecting sensitive data at every step.

item.title: Slow App Alert
item.description: Identify and fix mobile app performance issues causing slow load times and frustrating users.

item.title: Snowflake vs BQ vs Redshift
item.description: Compare Snowflake, BigQuery & Redshift in 2026: costs, performance & features to choose the best data warehouse for your needs.

item.title: Dev Essentials: 10 CLI Tools
item.description: Unlock 10 essential CLI tools to boost productivity and streamline development workflows.

item.title: Vision Tech (April 2026)
item.description: Explore real-world Computer Vision apps, from facial recognition to medical diagnostics, and their impact on industries.

item.title: AI Code Showdown
item.description: Compare top AI coding assistants: Copilot, Cursor, and more. Find the best fit for your coding needs.

item.title: Prevent Incidents
item.description: Prevent application downtime with proactive monitoring strategies and tools to minimize incidents and optimize performance.

item.title: Zero Trust: Bye Perimeter
item.description: Say goodbye to perimeter defense. Get insider tips on implementing Zero Trust Security for a safer network.

item.title: Engineer Smarter
item.description: Optimize engineering workflows with top BI tools, expert insights, and data-driven strategies to boost team efficiency and project success.

item.title: Netflix's Next Move
item.description: Uncover Netflix's content strategy and gain insights into their decision-making process for new shows and features.

item.title: Web3 Dev Uncovered
item.description: Unlock Web3 development secrets: costs, skills, and tools required to build decentralized apps and succeed in the ecosystem.

item.title: Code or Not (April 2026)
item.description: Decide between No-Code and Code: get clarity on when to use each for efficient project execution.

item.title: Data Showdown: Warehouse, Lake, or Lakehouse?
item.description: Compare data warehouses, lakes, and lakehouses to find the best fit for your analytics needs. Uncover key features, benefits, and use cases in this insightful showdown.

item.title: How Developers Are Using AI to 10x Their Output: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: A practical guide to How Developers Are Using AI to 10x Their Output covering implementation, real performance benchmarks, common mistakes, and honest tradeoffs.

item.title: VS Code Setup That Makes You 2x Faster: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: A practical guide to VS Code Setup That Makes You 2x Faster covering implementation, real performance benchmarks, common mistakes, and honest tradeoffs.

item.title: Index to Win
item.description: Unlock faster query times and boost database performance by mastering indexing techniques and best practices.

item.title: Documentation That Developers Actually Read: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: A practical guide to Documentation That Developers Actually Read covering implementation, real performance benchmarks, common mistakes, and honest tradeoffs.

item.title: Free AI Tools That Professionals Actually Use: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: A practical guide to Free AI Tools That Professionals Actually Use covering implementation, real performance benchmarks, common mistakes, and honest tradeoffs.
